column3: Product Definition Workbook  ·  K-12 Competition Hub  ·  Indonesia
One-stop registration & payment platform for K-12 competitions

column4: This page — document metadata and navigation guide
Full product requirements document — problem, goals, features, technical, launch
All 20 user stories with acceptance criteria — editable, filterable by persona
Information architecture — all screens across 3 portals with priority tags
Step-by-step user flow diagrams for registration, payment, and organizer flows
Open questions log with owner and due date — track unresolved decisions
Each tab is a living document — edit directly in the yellow-highlighted cells.
User Stories tab has dropdown filters for Persona and Priority — use these during sprint planning.
Info Arch tab has a screen count summary at the top — update as you add or remove screens.
User Flows tab uses color coding: blue = student action, amber = system action, green = success, red = error.
Open Questions tab — assign an owner and due date for every unresolved item before sprint planning.
